description: Cron jobs for Self-Improvement Observation Engine
note: These are DOCUMENTATION ONLY. Create actual cron jobs manually via OpenClaw cron interface.

jobs.name: daily-observers
jobs.purpose: Run all observers (conversation scorer, task tracker, cost tracker, aggregator) and generate daily scorecard

jobs.name: weekly-improvement-report
jobs.purpose: Generate weekly improvement summary report and suggestions for SOUL.md/MEMORY.md updates

setup_instructions: To create these cron jobs in OpenClaw:
2. Create new cron job with the schedule and command specified above
3. Set appropriate timeout and notification preferences
4. Test by running manually first: bash /root/.openclaw/workspace/self-improvement/run-observers.sh
